name: n8n Workflow Builder
description: Conversational AI agent (Claude via Vertex) that builds production-ready n8n workflows for Guesty departments. Phase-gated, department-scoped, knowledge-grounded (specs + skills + n8n-mcp). Embedded as an iframe inside the Innovation Hub; deploys finished workflows to guesty.app.n8n.cloud and links them back to Hub initiatives.

googleIap.description: Google Identity-Aware Proxy — @guesty.com accounts only. Locally bypassed via MOCK_USER_EMAIL.

skills.name: Build an n8n workflow
skills.description: Drive a phased conversation (interview → plan → build → self-check) that produces a validated, deployable n8n workflow JSON scoped to the user's department credentials and data sources.
examples: Create a daily workflow that posts new Zendesk CSAT scores to #cx-quality
Build a workflow that syncs Salesforce opportunities to a BigQuery table every hour
I need a Slack alert when a HubSpot deal over $50k moves to closed-won

skills.name: Search and validate n8n nodes
skills.description: Look up n8n node types and validate node configurations against the live n8n schema (via the n8n-mcp server), correcting credential keys and operation parameters.
examples: What parameters does the BigQuery node need for a query operation?
Validate this Slack node config for v2.4

skills.name: Deploy a workflow to n8n
skills.description: Create the workflow on guesty.app.n8n.cloud, tag it 'AI Generated', transfer it to the department's project, and emit a workflow_deployed event to the embedding Hub.
examples: Deploy this workflow to the CS sandbox project

x-status: A2A-ready scaffolding — this app does NOT yet expose an A2A JSON-RPC endpoint at `url`. Today it speaks HTTP+SSE (`/api/chat`, `/api/deploy`) and a browser postMessage protocol to its Hub host. This card documents capabilities for the planned A2A/Hermes integration; see cubaalvaro/claude-workspace-roots → 'AI Innovation Integration'.
